hub.title: workshop prompts
hub.subtitle: unlock each section as we go.
hub.about: your on-the-day companion for vibe coding: the right way — a 4-hour, in-person workshop in chennai. hameed, leo, and hari walk you from idea to product to customer using modern AI tools and proven startup thinking.

cards.title: who
cards.description: take it to the right people.

items.title: frame the problem
items.content:
I'm $NAME building a product for a real problem I've experienced.

Help me articulate:
1. Who has this problem?
2. Why does it matter now?
3. What happens if it stays unsolved?

My contact: $EMAIL

items.title: sharpen the value prop
items.content:
I'm $NAME. My product solves [describe problem].

Help me write a one-sentence value proposition that a stranger would understand in 10 seconds.

Reach me at $EMAIL if you need more context.

items.title: define mvp scope
items.content:
I'm $NAME scoping an MVP for [product idea].

Help me cut this down to the smallest version that still delivers real value. List must-have features vs. nice-to-haves.

Contact: $EMAIL

items.title: choose a tech stack
items.content:
I'm $NAME, a builder with [your skill level]. I want to ship [product type] fast using modern AI tools.

Recommend a pragmatic stack and explain trade-offs for a solo builder.

Email: $EMAIL

items.title: starter prompt
items.description: pick what you're shipping. copy a prompt tuned for that stack.

options.title: landing page
options.subtitle: custom design.md
options.content:
I'm $NAME building a marketing landing page for [product idea].

Stack: a single landing page with a custom DESIGN.md styleguide (generate one at /resources/design-generator or pick inspiration from /design-repository). Follow the design tokens strictly — colors, typography, spacing, and voice from DESIGN.md only.

Help me:
1. Structure the page (hero, problem, solution, social proof, CTA)
2. Write copy that matches the design.md voice
3. List the components I need (nav, hero, feature grid, footer)
4. Ship a polished landing page a stranger would trust in 10 seconds

My email for follow-up: $EMAIL

options.title: web app
options.subtitle: shadcn/ui
options.content:
I'm $NAME building a web app for [product idea].

Stack: React + TypeScript, Shadcn/ui components, Tailwind CSS. Use Shadcn patterns for forms, dialogs, tables, sheets, and navigation. Accessible, keyboard-friendly, responsive.

Help me:
1. Define the core screens and user flows for MVP
2. Map each screen to Shadcn components (Button, Card, Dialog, Form, Table, etc.)
3. Suggest folder structure and state approach for a solo builder
4. List what to build first vs. defer

Contact: $EMAIL

options.title: mobile app
options.subtitle: ionic react
options.content:
I'm $NAME building a mobile app for [product idea].

Stack: Ionic React with Capacitor. Use Ionic components (IonPage, IonHeader, IonContent, IonTabBar, IonCard, IonList, IonButton). Mobile-first patterns: tab navigation, pull-to-refresh where appropriate, native-feeling transitions.

Help me:
1. Define the tab structure and primary user journeys
2. Map screens to Ionic components
3. Handle platform differences (iOS vs Android) pragmatically
4. Plan for App Store / Play Store launch basics

$EMAIL

items.title: design inspiration
items.description: real brand design systems as design.md files. pick one, download, ship on-brand ui.

who.title: who
who.eyebrow: take it to the right people

items.title: identify early adopters
items.content:
I'm $NAME launching [product].

Help me identify my first 10 ideal users: where they hang out, what language they use, and how to reach them without a marketing budget.

$EMAIL

items.title: write outreach copy
items.content:
I'm $NAME reaching out to potential early users for [product].

Write a short, honest cold message I can send on LinkedIn or email. No hype — builder-to-builder tone.

Sign off with my name: $NAME
